brokerCatalog.name: Intelius
brokerCatalog.impactReason: PeopleConnect suppression can affect multiple affiliated properties.
brokerCatalog.plainDescription: PeopleConnect broker family. One workflow can matter across multiple affiliated sites.
brokerCatalog.userNote: PeopleConnect family

brokerPlaybook.suppressionLane: Suppress and maintain the PeopleConnect record; this is the lane that keeps affiliated people-search sites from showing the listing.
brokerPlaybook.deletionLane: Do not use PeopleConnect deletion for search-visibility removal. Deletion can wipe the suppression and allow the cluster to re-list from public records.
brokerPlaybook.emailFallback: Reserve the privacy email for a deliberate rights request or broken portal follow-up, not as a replacement for maintained suppression.
knownQuirks: Work this parent before child brands, then re-scan children.
The verification link is session-bound; open it in the same browser session that requested it.
A completed PeopleConnect deletion email means suppression may have been removed and should be re-run.

knownQuirks: Multiple listing URLs may exist for one person; each URL can need its own opt-out.
Free-search suppression is not the same as full data deletion.
